title: Runtime prompt cleanup and hard-coded shortcut removal
goal: Make the agent rely on module skills for module workflows and remove the temporary workorder-specific direct-open shortcut.
requirements: Keep general UI context and ui.open_right_panel guidance in the system prompt.
Move workorder-specific examples out of the general prompt and into the workorders skill.
Remove direct workorder opening helper logic from services.agent_runtime.graph.
Ensure run_agent and stream_agent both support activate_skill.
Add tests that the prompt encourages using skills for module workflows.
Add regression tests proving the temporary workorder shortcut functions are gone or unused.
acceptance: Runtime graph no longer contains workorder-specific direct-open shortcut logic.
System prompt remains domain-neutral for object opening.
Skill activation tests pass for stream and non-stream paths.
The agent still has access to ui.get_current_context and ui.open_right_panel.
